title: Wacky Weaponry
description: Wacky Weaponry adds a bunch of wacky and silly stuff!
body:
# <center>Wacky Weaponry</center>
[![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b9d2c289db211cf86af07adb3d181b4ea5624296.png)](https://discord.gg/V3DTUtgGeG)

[![StrawberryLib](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ContentSMP/Badges/refs/heads/main/strawberrylib/cozy_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/strawberrylib)

Wacky Weaponry is a weapon mod that adds some pretty silly stuff!
For a full list of features, check out everything below!

_It's recommended to play this mod with [Enchancement](https://modrinth.com/mod/enchancement) installed._
## <center>Features</center>

### <center>Wonky Hammer</center>
The Wonky Hammer is a cartoony toy hammer which makes cartoon noises and particles when hitting entities!

![A Husk being attacked with a Wonky Hammer](https://files.catbox.moe/s7ckst.gif)

Wonky Hammers are obtained by finding any **Zombies** or **Husks** that may spawn with one in their hand! They have a ~60% chance of dropping any **Wonky Hammers** they hold!

Wonky Hammers can get repaired using Iron Ingots.

### <center>Wonky Boots</center>
Wonky Boots are a diamond level pair of boots with two unique enchantments for them!
They can get repaired using Iron Ingots.

![A Player wearing a pair of Wonky Boots.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ccfede333d3c01672872c277171b8c86e1fdf9f7.png)

Wonky Boots are also obtained by finding any **Zombies** or **Husks** that may spawn wearing some!
They also have a ~60% chance of dropping any **Wonky Boots** they wear!

### <center>Wacky Bomb</center>
Wacky Bombs are useful explosives that can get whacked away with a Wonky Hammer.

![A Wacky Bomb getting whacked with a Wonky Hammer and hitting a distant Husk](https://files.catbox.moe/hl2igk.gif)

![The recipe for Wacky Bombs, containing three Iron Ingots, two Purple Dye, two Yellow Dye, some String and one Gunpowder in the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b7b8b3bad07af35f3e68fa7bd3243941d5aacfa.png)

### <center>Lollipop</center>
Lollipops are fun food items that give you two hunger when consumed.

![The recipe for a Lollipop, containing three Sugar, one Paper and Red Dye in the center.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8b9190c4ae5c9dac63b93540a4d12a7269d098c.png)

## <center>Launching Enchantment</center>
Launching is an enchantment exclusive to the Wonky Hammer.
It launches the user up by a bit when hitting an entity mid-air.

![Player attacking a Husk with a Launching enchanted Wonky Hammer.](https://files.catbox.moe/3c22x0.gif)

## Wonky Boot Enchantments
### Springy
_Perpetually bounces you around. Sneak to temporarily disable._
![A Player bouncing around with a pair of Wonky Boots enchanted with the Springy enchantment](https://files.catbox.moe/qcj7nq.gif)
### Stomping
_Sneaking while falling onto any entity will damage it and bounce you up a little._

![A Player stomping onto an innocent Pig below using Wonky Boots enchanted with Stomping.](https://files.catbox.moe/ivr38r.gif)
